indexing.paragraph: Subject: Extension Request: Digital Literacy Project – Astitva Anand Srivastava - 25BMR10002
I am writing to respectfully request a 48-hour extension on the Digital Literacy Project assignment, originally due on March 31st.

Unfortunately, I have experienced an unexpected technical failure with my primary laptop, which has temporarily hindered my ability to finalize the GitHub repository uploads. I am currently using the university computing lab to restore my files and aim to submit the completed work by April 2nd.
Thank you for your time and for considering my request.
Subject: Summer Internship Inquiry - Chaitanya Vaidya - B.Tech CSE Core

I am a first-year B.Tech Computer Science student at VIT Bhopal University. I am writing to express my strong interest in potential summer internship opportunities at your organization within the software development department.

Through my coursework and independent projects, I have developed a foundational understanding of digital collaboration and version control using GitHub. I am eager to apply my technical skills in a professional environment and contribute to your team’s objectives.
My digital portfolio, which showcases my recent projects and certifications, can be viewed here: https://github.com/chaitanyaofficialhq-blip.
Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I might contribute to your company.
